name: Laminate Collection Bath Etagere - Brightroom™
description:
Maximize your bathroom space with this Laminate Collection Bath Etagere from Brightroom™. Made of particle board, this bathroom etagere features three shelves and can be fitted above your toilet. Designed in a white color, this etagere provides extra function and visual appeal to your bathroom.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
